name: stawi-opportunities
description: Repo-root manifest that exists so Cloudflare Pages' mandatory root-level install step (v2 build strategy runs `npm clean-install` before the build command) succeeds. The frontend itself lives under ui/ and is built by `make ui-build`, which installs ui, ui/app and ui/admin, runs the Vite + Hugo builds, and emits ui/public. There are no root-level runtime dependencies.
